title: 2008年6月大学英语六级真题(第1套)

sections.title: Part I Writing
sections.directions: For this part, you are allowed 30 minutes to write a short essay entitled Will E-books Replace Traditional Books? You should write at least 150 words following the outline given below. 1.随着信息技术的发展，电子图书越来越多 2.有人认为电子图书会取代传统图书，理由是…… 3.我的看法 Will E-books Replace Traditional Books?

options.A: The man might be able to play in the World Cup.
options.B: The man’s football career seems to be at an end.
options.C: The man was operated on a few weeks ago.
options.D: The man is a fan of world-famous football players.

options.A: Work out a plan to tighten his budget
options.B: Find out the opening hours of the cafeteria.
options.C: Apply for a senior position in the restaurant.
options.D: Solve his problem by doing a part-time job.

questions.explanation: A) A financial burden. C) A real nuisance. B) A good companion D) A well-trained pet.

answerMeta.sourceText: A) A financial burden. C) A real nuisance. B) A good companion D) A well-trained pet.

options.C: The computing system is too complex.
options.D: He has called the woman several times.

options.A: New laws are yet to be made to reduce pollutant release.
options.B: Pollution has attracted little attention from the public.
options.C: The quality of air will surely change for the better.
options.D: It’ll take years to bring air pollution under control.

questions.explanation: A) An ancient building. C) An Egyptian museum. B) A world of antiques. D) An Egyptian Memorial.

answerMeta.sourceText: A) An ancient building. C) An Egyptian museum. B) A world of antiques. D) An Egyptian Memorial.

options.A: Its power bill reaches $9 million a year.
options.B: It sells thousands of light bulbs a day.
options.C: It supplies power to a nearby town.
options.D: It generates 70% of the electricity it uses.

options.C: Thinking about doing a different job.

options.A: She has finally got a promotion and a pay raise.
options.B: She has got a satisfactory job in another company.
options.C: She could at last leave the accounting department.
options.D: She managed to keep her position in the company.

options.A: He and Andrea have proved to be a perfect match.
options.B: He changed his mind about marriage unexpectedly.
options.C: He declared that he would remain single all his life.
options.D: He would marry Andrea even without meeting her.
